title: Overpowered Infinity
description: Allows infinity to be paired with mending on bows, affect crossbows, and to apply to all arrow types.
body:
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GNqb2TFh/images/8babfd1117660b50426e892af4efc84dd1486b7e.png)

Expands the capabilities of the Infinity enchantment:
- Infinity and Mending are compatible on a bow and crossbow
- Infinity applies to all arrow types (regular, tipped, spectral)
